title: EVA OPENS HER EYES — 'THAT'S IT?!'
prompt: Tight close-up in @dentist-chair on @Eva's face. Her eyes are still squeezed shut, paper bib clipped on. A beat of stillness — then her eyes FLY OPEN, wide and surprised. A slow disbelieving smile spreads across her face. Eva (whispered, surprised): "...wait." Eva (louder, beaming, total astonishment): "That's IT?!" Eva (giggling, wonder): "It TICKLED! It just TICKLED!" Eva looks straight at the camera, beaming the biggest grin of the whole episode — the moment the fear officially breaks. Solo shot, only Eva visible, no other faces, no full dentist body.
